'''walufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffron|chaffron]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffron|chaffron]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| walufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wælifith|wælifith]] || [[word:wælifij|wælifij]] || [[word:wælifish|wælifish]] || [[word:wælifi|wælifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:walulufuth|walulufuth]] || [[word:walulufuj|walulufuj]] || [[word:walulufush|walulufush]] || [[word:walulufu|walulufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:walufuth|walufuth]] || [[word:walufuj|walufuj]] || [[word:walufush|walufush]] || [[word:walufu|walufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:waluffuth|waluffuth]] || [[word:waluffuj|waluffuj]] || [[word:waluffush|waluffush]] || [[word:waluffuf|waluffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:walufuthu|walufuthu]] || [[word:walufuju|walufuju]] || [[word:walufushu|walufushu]] || [[word:walufuku|walufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:walufuth|walufuth]] || [[word:walufuj|walufuj]] || [[word:walufush|walufush]] || [[word:walufu|walufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:walufuthul|walufuthul]] || [[word:walufujul|walufujul]] || [[word:walufushul|walufushul]] || [[word:walufukul|walufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:walufuthuthu|walufuthuthu]] || [[word:walufujuju|walufujuju]] || [[word:walufushushu|walufushushu]] || [[word:walufuku|walufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:walufuthun|walufuthun]] || [[word:walufujun|walufujun]] || [[word:walufushun|walufushun]] || [[word:walufukun|walufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:walufuthuoro|walufuthuoro]] || [[word:walufujuoro|walufujuoro]] || [[word:walufushuoro|walufushuoro]] || [[word:walufukuoro|walufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
